name: M Vision Public Company Limited
summary: M Vision Public Company Limited engages in various events organizing businesses in Thailand. The company organizes various events, such as mobile phone, IT and electronics exhibition, sport tournament, tourism campaign, seminar, and others related to event. It also acts as a publisher and distributor of online and offline media, and marketing activities agent. The company distributes and services IT products through various media, such as offline, online, digital agency, exhibition, academic seminar, sport event, and e-commerce. In addition, it sells mobile phones, smart phones, tablets and accessories as well as electronics, electronic motorcycle, and technology equipment. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
